# kemp_owasp_custom_data (Resource)

Uploads a custom OWASP data file (admin-level) — typically a word/IP list referenced by ModSecurity rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_owasp_custom_data" "blocked_user_agents" {
  filename = "blocked_user_agents.data"
  data     = base64encode(file("${path.module}/blocked_user_agents.data"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String, Sensitive) **Required.** Base64-encoded data file content. Use `base64encode(file("path/to/file"))`. Forces replacement if changed.
- `filename` (String) **Required.** Filename including extension (e.g. `owasp_cust.data`). Forces replacement if changed.
